Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Ritholz, (626)844-7102 for Claimant Jean Achenbach. (via court call)

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CLAIMANT SEMINOFF, WAYNE's Motion For Order Releasing Deposited Funds is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Ntc Of Hearing And Mtn For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Appearing through CourtCall Atty. Andrew Ritholz (626-844-7102) appearing for Claimant Wane Seminoff. No appearance by any other party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CLAIMANT WAYNE SEMINOFF'S Motion For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Hearing And Mtn For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Continued To Mar-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Ritholz, Esq., (626-844-7102), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Wane Seminoff, Claimant and moving party.
Jean C. Achenbach, Defendant in pro per APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, (877-264-5657 x111).
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. Discussion re Declaration under Probate Code 13100. Court orders the claimant to submit amended Declaration approved as to form. This matter is continued to March 23, 2015 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. If the amended Declaration is submitted prior to March 23, 2015 and the form is in conformity or approved as to form, Court will grant the motion and will vacate the March 23, 2015 hearing.

CLAIMANT SEMINOFF, WAYNE, AS AGENT FOR COLLECTION FOR EARL's Motion For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest is continued to March 23, 2015 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Hearing And Mtn For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Andrew Ritholz, for moving party appeared via Court call
Jean C. Achenbach, claimant 877-264-5657, appeared via Courtcall

The Court hears argument. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument continues this matter to March 11, 2015 at 9:30am in Department 501 for compliance by moving party, with Probate Code 13100. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported

Ntc Of Hearing And Mtn For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CLAIMANT WAYNE SEMINOFF's Motion For Order Releasing Deposited Funds With Interest is continued to January 21, 2015.
